html:
Exclusive to:  

The License Plate can be captured in a Trawl Net.

It can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_16".

×7

×5

×3

Trivia

  • Only Wilson, Wendy, WX-78, Webber, and potentially Willow or Wagstaff seem to know what a license plate is.

License Plate
Object Info
40
Source
Dropped by
:
Miscellaneous
"trinket_16"
Exclusive to:
“How did this get all the way out here?”
–Wilson
“Litter is a terrible thing.”
–Willow
“I do not know what this is.”
–Wolfgang
“Whatever this belonged to met a bad end.”
–Wendy
“HOW DID THIS GET HERE?”
–WX-78
“What does this inscription mean?”
–Wickerbottom
“It just a little sheet of metal, eh?”
–Woodie
“Letters and numbers... some sort of secret code?”
–Maxwell
“I hypothesize this came in through a rift.”
–Wagstaff
“A piece öf armör?”
–Wigfrid
“Where's the automobile?”
–Webber
“An odd shaped plate...”
–Walani
“This has no business calling itself a plate.”
–Warly
“A strange plate b'this.”
–Woodlegs
“HATH THE SCRATCHING O' THE UNPIGS”
–Wilba
“Name?”
–Wormwood
“It's either an important clue to an adventure, or it's completely useless to me.”
–Wheeler
The License Plate can be captured in a Trawl Net.
It can be spawned into the game with the code "trinket_16".
×7
×5
×3
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Only Wilson, Wendy, WX-78, Webber, and potentially Willow or Wagstaff seem to know what a license plate is.
